chunks.text: Order Sheet IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, BENCH AT SUKKUR Crl. Bail Application No.S- 309 of 2023 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge. Hearing of Case 1.For orders on office objections. 2. For hearing of Bail Application 24-07-2023 Mr. Muhammad Ali Napar, Advocate along with applicant. Mr. Shafi Muhammad Mahar, Deputy P.G for the State. O R D E R Complainant Ghulam Farooq Mahar is present and submits biometric affidavit of no objection for confirmation of interim pre- arrest bail earlier granted to the applicant Abdul Basit Khoso by this Court on the ground that they have patched up their dispute outside the Court. Learned Deputy P.G noted and conceded. Accordingly, by consent the above bail application is allowed and the interim pre-arrest bail earlier granted to the applicant by this Court is hereby confirmed on same terms and conditions. JUDGE Ahmad
